creator: naito.yuichiro@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 198293
specinfra.patch

Rubygem-specinfra has been updated to 2.76.2.
The attached `specinfra.patch` upgrades rubygem-specinfra port.

I found `specinfra.gemspec` file has been updated and needed to update a patch file for it.
So I fixed `patch-specinfra.gemspec` file. This is renamed from `patch-gemspec` 
file for making as same filename as makepatch target generates.
And I fixed a portlint warning, too.

Please apply to ports tree.
Thank you.
